title: Drum project (v1)
description: A saved unit of work in the sheetydrums web app: a YouTube source plus its drum transcription. Keyed by YouTube video id. The `notation` field IS the events contract (schema/events.schema.json) verbatim — this wrapper only adds source provenance and timestamps, keeping the notation contract pure.

video_id.description: YouTube video id. Also the storage key (projects/<video_id>.json).

url.description: The YouTube URL the audio was fetched from.

video_id.description: YouTube video id parsed from the URL.

title.description: Video title from yt-dlp, when available.

notation.description: The drum transcription — the events.json contract, unchanged.

created_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the project was first created (server-set).

updated_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of the last save (server-set).

has_stem.description: Runtime-only flag on GET responses (not persisted): whether the isolated drum-stem WAV exists for drums-only playback.
